results.rendered_html:
vi-√śrambh (accord. to some, more correctly -srambh) Ā. -śrambhate, to confide, be confident, trust in or rely on (loc.),  BhP.  (ind.p. -śrabhya = trustfully, with confidence) :
Caus. -śrambhayati, to relax, loosen, untie,  Lāṭy. ;
to inspire with confidence, encourage,  MBh.
